MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR TUES., APRIL-02-2014: ATTORNEY DAVID J. FORAN APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; PROPERTY MANAGER BRIAN WOLK IS ALSO PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ALBENIA IMERI IS PRESENT WITHOUT COUNSEL THIS DAY.
